releaseSummary: Added a Specialty Lenses page for Endless Pilot Progressive and OmniLux NAL, with expandable on-page information instead of separate product pages.
The page is available under Lifestyle Lenses. The desktop column now reads House Brands, and the mobile menu opens as a full-screen frosted panel.

moduleImpact.notes: Updated as part of Specialty Lenses.

migrationNotes: No manual data migration is required for this release.
